scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.pack:dry-run: bun run build && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/definition && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/validator && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/core && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/adapter-core && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/executor-shell && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/executor-agent && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/executor-http && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/executor-file && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/runtime && npm_config_cache=/tmp/sop-runtime-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json ./packages/cli
scripts.smoke:cli: bun run cli -- validate examples/basic_sop_definition.json && bun run cli -- trace examples/basic_sop_definition.json --input examples/basic_input.json && bun run cli -- run examples/echo_sop_definition.json --input examples/basic_input.json
scripts.smoke:adapter: bun run smoke:shell && bun run smoke:agent && bun run smoke:http && bun run smoke:file
scripts.check:adapter: bun run check && bun run smoke:adapter
scripts.check:alpha: bun run check && bun run pack:dry-run && bun run smoke:cli && bun run smoke:adapter
